title: Store Favorites folder open/closed state upon reload
excerpt: It would be great if the Folders used in Favorites stayed in their open/closed state upon reload. Right now Favorites are always open on page reload, kind of defeating the purpose of folders and forcing me to scroll more…

posts.author: RobEisman (Rob Eisman)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if the Folders used in Favorites stayed in their open/closed state upon reload. Right now Favorites are always open on page reload, kind of defeating the purpose of folders and forcing me to scroll more than I intended or close the folders I currently don’t need.
